name: High Inbound Emails Containing Attachments From External Host
notes:
This rule triggers when an address outside the organization sends numerous emails containing attachments. This could indicate an attempt to deliver a malware by targeting a large number of recipients.

Note: The threshold should be adapted to the size of the company
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Originating Host
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Content Information
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY High Inbound Emails Containing Attachments From External Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Originating Host
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Content Information
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
AND when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Potential Hostile Mail Attachment
Event description: Detects when numerous people in the organization receive emails containing attachments from the same external sender.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
